title: Senior Manager, California State Affairs
raw_description: Careers Senior Manager, California State Affairs Location Candidates based in Sacramento are strongly preferred. Applicants located in the San Francisco Bay Area will also be considered, with the expectation of frequent travel to Sacramento. Duration This is a three-year fixed-term position with full benefits and the possibility of extension. Application Instructions Please submit a cover letter and writing sample. Your writing sample should demonstrate your ability to communicate effectively with a non-technical audience. This may include a public-facing piece such as an , blog post, white paper, or other similar content. Program Overview The State Affairs program of the Political Affairs department leads EDF’s efforts to achieve our policy goals through legislative, regulatory, and political engagement at the state and local levels. Our lobbyists, communicators, organizers and experts work together to achieve progress on our priority issues. Overall Function The Senior Manager, California State Affairs will lead the development and implementation of key aspects of EDF’s California-based work. Reporting to Senior Director, California, the Senior Manager’s responsibilities will include leading the collaborative design and implementation of effective education and policy advocacy campaigns to support EDF’s major workstream priorities in California. This work will entail managing consultants, coordinating among multiple EDF workstreams and experts, coordinating with partner org Careers Location Candidates based in Sacramento are strongly preferred. title: Senior Manager - Technical Accounting
salary: Salary Range Expected salary range of $155,000-$180,000,
raw_salary: Salary Range Expected salary range of $155,000-$180,000,
raw_description: About HASI is an investor in sustainable infrastructure assets advancing the energy transition. With more than $16 billion in managed assets, our investments are diversified across multiple asset classes, including utility-scale solar, storage, and onshore wind; distributed solar and storage; RNG; and energy efficiency. We combine deep expertise in energy markets and financial structuring with long-standing programmatic client partnerships to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns and measurable environmental benefits. HA Sustainable Infrastructure Capital, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange (Ticker: HASI). For more information, please visit hasi.com. Position Summary HASI is seeking a Senior Manager – Technical Accounting to join our accounting team in Annapolis, MD. This role will be responsible for evaluating the appropriate accounting treatment for our investments (equity investments, debt securities, financing receivables, real estate and securitizations) as well as the subsequent accounting for certain complex transactions including research and applying facts to judgmental areas of the accounting guidance. This role will also support quarterly close activities such as entries for Equity Method Investments, Current Expected Credit Loss (CECL) analysis, and footnote development. This position will report to our AVP – Technical Accounting. Salary Range Expected salary range of $155,000-$180,000, based on experience and location. title: Backend Developer Python
raw_description: Octopus Energy, c’est l’histoire d’une idée audacieuse: rendre l’énergie plus verte, moins chère et accessible à tous, en créant le premier fournisseur d'énergie véritablement digital. Et si le projet a d’abord émergé au Royaume-Uni, depuis 2022, ce projet s’étend aussi à la France! 🇫🇷 En associant une technologie de pointe à des personnes talentueuses, profondément attachées autant à nos clients qu’à la transition vers les énergies renouvelables, nous continuons de concrétiser ce projet. En trois ans, nous sommes ainsi devenus le cinquième fournisseur français! Notre mission? Fournir une énergie moins chère et plus verte à tous les Français, ainsi que des solutions concrètes pour accélérer la transition écologique. Aujourd'hui, nous développons la prochaine génération de produits qui accélèrent la transition vers les énergies vertes. Qu'il s'agisse de faciliter le passage à l'énergie

title: Director - Capital Partnerships
salary: Salary Range Expected salary range of $190,000-$240,000,
raw_salary: Salary Range Expected salary range of $190,000-$240,000,
raw_description: Position Summary HASI is seeking an individual with experience with debt product structuring, securitization, and institutional investors to join our team. This individual will work on the Investment Team as a key interface with a large network of institutional investors. The core responsibilities of the role will focus on raising capital for both historic HASI securitization transactions and new senior debt opportunities. The Director will interface with certain capital partners (generally insurance companies, pension funds and banks) on a periodic cadence to understand market dynamics and what opportunities might be a fit. As potential transactions with capital partners advance, the Director will lead execution to closing in collaboration with other members of the Investment Team. The role will require working within a deal team as well as maintaining consistent communication across a large network of institutional investors. The Director will report to the Managing Director – Capital Partnerships. Salary Range Expected salary range of $190,000-$240,000, based on level, experience and location. In addition, HASI offers an annual bonus program; 401(k) with company match; an equity incentive program; comprehensive medical, dental and vision benefits; paid time off for vacation, holidays, and sick days; and much more. title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
salary: This role is eligible for cash bonuses and equity incentives.
raw_salary: This role is eligible for cash bonuses and equity incentives.
raw_description: About GoodLeap: GoodLeap is a technology company delivering best-in-class financing and software products for sustainable solutions, from solar panels and batteries to energy-efficient HVAC, heat pumps, roofing, windows, and more. Over 1 million homeowners have benefited from our simple, fast, and frictionless technology that makes the adoption of these products more affordable, accessible, and easier to understand. raw_description: About GoodLeap: GoodLeap is a technology company delivering best-in-class financing and software products for sustainable solutions, from solar panels and batteries to energy-efficient HVAC, heat pumps, roofing, windows, and more. title: Senior Backend Engineer
raw_description: Octopus Energy started with a bold idea: to build Britain’s first truly digital energy supplier. By combining world-class tech with brilliant humans who care deeply about customers and driving the renewable energy transition, we made it happen and in 2025, we became Britain’s largest energy supplier. Now, we’re scaling fast and building the generation of products to accelerate the green energy transition. From making it effortless to switch to heat pumps, solar and EVs, to launching smart tariffs and creating renewable generation at scale, we’re solving some of the most complex challenges in energy with speed, creativity and customer obsession. We’re also enabling our global businesses to reach the full capability of what we’ve achieved in the UK, taking the learnings, products and experiences that customers love here and rolling them out worldwide. At Octopus Tech, you’ll have real ownership, variety, and the chance to shape products that make a tangible difference in people’s lives - lowering bills, enabling greener living, and delivering experiences customers genuinely love. You’ll work side by side with teams across marketing, operations, and data, and see the impact of your work in the real world, fast. We are looking for Senior Backend Engineers to join our Flexibility team. The flexibility team is building the generation of products and tools to make energy more flexible. These include our flagship Intelligent Octopus product automating demand shift for 300,000 custome The flexibility team is building the generation of products and tools to make energy more flexible. The team develops products that are used by millions of customers, helping boost renewables use and decarbonise energy systems worldwide. title: Analyst, Total Rewards
raw_description: Careers Analyst, Total Rewards Location U.S. Remote, with preference for those in proximity to current EDF Office locations (Austin, TX; Boston, MA; New York, NY; Raleigh, NC; Washington, DC). Duration This is a 9-month fixed-term position with full benefits. Overall Function The Analyst, Total Rewards is an early-career role supporting both Benefits and Compensation. This position is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, curious, and eager to grow a career in Total Rewards. You will manage core administrative processes while also evaluating jobs, analyzing market information, and helping to develop process improvements that directly influence how we attract, retain, and reward talent. This position plays a critical role in ensuring our total rewards programs are competitive, equitable, and aligned with our environmental mission. title: Dual Fuel Smart Meter Engineer (East Midlands)
raw_description: Help us make a big green dent in the universe. We're on a mission to drive the global renewable energy revolution and need your help to turn our vision into a reality. We're looking for smart meter engineers with a track record of safety and customer excellence. You’ll be representing our brands in our customers’ homes so you’ll need to be just as happy talking to the customer and getting to know them as you are about doing the installation itself. You’ll be fitting meters; showing customers how their meter and in-home display work; how it can help them save energy and answering any questions about the green energy revolution we are leading. As part of the Octopus Energy Services team, we’ll ensure you have the best of everything you need to deliver the top-class service we’re aiming for. You’ll be supported by an office team who will share the same performance goals, so we’re always working as one team. title: Operations Data Analyst
raw_description: Benvenuti nel futuro dell’energia! La missione di Octopus Energy è rendere l’energia rinnovabile accessibile a tutti. Grazie alla tecnologia, stiamo guidando la rivoluzione energetica a livello globale, offrendo energia pulita a prezzi convenienti e un servizio clienti eccellente. Se non ti piacciono le sfide non inviarci la tua candidatura ;) In Octopus Energy non amiamo la burocrazia, le regole troppo stringenti e le offerte commerciali poco chiare. Vogliamo rivoluzionare il mercato energetico italiano. Per farlo, siamo alla ricerca di persone motivate, che condividano i nostri stessi valori. Se hai a cuore il futuro del nostro pianeta e vuoi aiutarci a migliorare il settore energetico, unisciti al nostro team! Con la crescita vertiginosa che stiamo avendo in Octopus, è emersa la straordinaria opportunità di fare la differenza andando a utilizzare in modo intelligente e creativo la grande mole di dati che ogni giorno gestiamo come compagnia energetica. Per fare questo abbiamo quindi deciso di aprire una posizione come Operations Data Analyst. In questo ruolo potrai avere un impatto positivo sulla vita dei nostri clienti, sul pianeta e su chi ogni giorno aiuta direttamente i clienti. Infatti, in Octopus le Operations sono il cuore di tutto ciò che facciamo: persone stupende che ogni giorno aiutano i nostri clienti con un approccio universale e con l’autonomia di soddisfare le loro richieste con creatività e amore. title: Chief Administrative Officer
raw_description: This is a moment of existential consequence for American democracy. At this juncture Protect Democracy stands as one of the nation’s leading and most respected nonpartisan organizations dedicated to preventing our democracy from further declining into authoritarianism. We are now seeking a courageous, exceptional leader to serve as our Chief Administrative Officer (CAO), leading our work in finance, accounting, risk management and legal, IT, and security—while uplifting and advancing our core culture principles . Reporting directly to the Executive Director, the CAO is amongst the most senior operational leaders overseeing Protect Democracy’s business operations in service of our mission. This is a unique opportunity for a highly experienced senior leader to drive a transformational operational strategy—maximizing resilient systems, strengthening organizational health, and enabling our team to meet the complex demands of this moment in our democracy’s history. Critical to this mission is maintaining strong programmatic partnerships, including a Harvard Law School clinic and coalitions with dozens of leading national and local groups and actors. Growth-oriented feedback culture: Essential to our organization’s ability to meet the needs of this moment is our unique culture—guided by mission as our north star, we aim to balance collaboration and decisive leadership; excellence and work-life balance; candor and kindness. title: Director of Content and Creative
raw_description: About the Role The Director of Content and Creative is responsible for how Teramind tells its story in writing, digital content, social, and creative expression. This leader is an integral member of the marketing leadership team, owning the content and creative architecture of the editorial voice, brand standards, the digital intelligence that tells us whether that voice is landing, and the network of external partners and suppliers that brings it all to life. At the core, this is an orchestrator role. Someone who knows how to source, brief, manage, and hold accountable the agencies, freelancers, and specialist vendors that execute Teramind's content and creative output. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in the craft and uses that expertise to direct others rather than do it themselves. This role carries both strategic and executional demands from day one. The ideal candidate thrives in that environment, someone who can set direction while simultaneously delivering, and who knows how to get the best work out of external partners at pace. title: Field Marketing Specialist Southern Europe
raw_description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. As the Marketing Specialist – South Europe, you will support the planning and execution of marketing programs and campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and pipeline growth in the region. You will work closely with our sales team (Account Executives, Customer Success Managers, and Business Development Representatives) as well as global marketing functions to align regional efforts with overarching business objectives. This role is hands-on and execution-focused, ideal for a marketing professional with practical experience who is looking to develop deeper expertise in B2B marketing within a fast-paced environment. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and French; Spanish and Italian language skills are a plus.

title: Senior Financial Associate, Strategic Initiatives
raw_description: GoodLeap is also proud to support our award-winning nonprofit, GivePower, which is building and deploying life-saving water and clean electricity systems, changing the lives of more than 1. Summary: The Senior Financial Associate of Strategic Initiatives is responsible for the financial stewardship and performance reporting of GoodLeap's new credit card program. This role will focus on building the financial operating infrastructure to support a successful, growing card business. This role sits at the intersection of three critical functions: providing executives with clear, data-driven views of the card program's financial performance; partnering with the capital markets team on portfolio strategy decisions, including the timing and structure of investor sales; and serving as GoodLeap's primary financial point of contact with the issuing bank, ensuring all reporting obligations are met

title: Lead, Talent Acquisition EMEA
raw_description: This role reports to the VP of HR and is ideal for a hands on recruiting leader who thrives in the full cycle, not just the strategic layer. title: Hybrid Decarbonization Scientist
raw_description: Carbon Direct is seeking a highly skilled and motivated Hybrid Decarbonization Scientist to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for supporting deep diligences and conducting scientific assessments of decarbonization technologies, strategies, and projects. You will play a critical role in ensuring the scientific rigor and integrity of our advisory services, working closely with clients to evaluate solutions that effectively reduce greenhouse gas emissions. A significant part of this role involves translating deep expertise in Bioenergy with Carbon Capture and Storage (BECCS), biomass with carbon removal and storage (BiCRS), and biochar projects into recommendations for a range of clients. We recognize that teams with diverse backgrounds and different experiences are powerful. Carbon Direct is seeking a highly skilled and motivated to join our team. You will play a critical role in ensuring the scientific rigor and integrity of our advisory services, working closely with clients to evaluate solutions that effectively reduce greenhouse gas emissions. At Carbon Direct, we offer a robust package that considers the whole person, their partners, and their families – and we’re always looking to improve. raw_salary: compensation in California (Base pay + Incentives) for the first 12 months ranges from $60,000 to $90,000
raw_description: The Field Sales Consultant self-generates sales leads and presents in-home presentations on our solar products and services for potential customers. Their priority is to make a genuine human connection with the potential customers with the intent to qualify and vet solar as a viable energy solution for their home and families. If you enjoy face to face interaction, engaging customers and find the idea of working out in the field exciting, then this is the job for you! The self-generates sales leads and presents in-home presentations on our solar products and services for potential customers. Provide an industry leading customer sales experience from initial contact through installation and after the customer's system is turned on. Handle the pipeline of activity from prospect to install by following up with all leads and in-home consultations. Employees on our Freedom Time Off Plan are not limited to a set number of days that they are entitled to take off from work and instead have the freedom to manage how much time off they need!. Please note that the compensation information is made in good faith for this position only. raw_description: As a Sales Development Representative, you will be responsible for handling incoming leads, phone calls and sales chats from the Articulate website—answering questions, qualifying leads and passing opportunities and more complex questions to the appropriate Articulate team member. In addition to handling inbound leads, the Sales Development Representative will also perform scripted outbound sales activities. This role sits at the intersection of technology, learning, and strategy. title: Re-Commerce Manager
location: Carneys Point, New Jersey, United States
raw_description: The Re-Commerce Manager owns the resale of returned, excess, and refurbished inventory across third-party marketplaces. This role is responsible for turning un-restockable inventory into sellable product through strong execution in grading, presentation, listing quality, pricing, and channel strategy. Our mission is simple: to make really high quality essentials for really low prices, produced fairly and sustainably. title: State Impact Specialist (Wisconsin)
raw_description: This is a remote position based in Wisconsin. The priority application deadline for this role is March 8, 2026. The Impact Specialist will build on Protect Democracy’s recent related advocacy efforts across states, ranging from educating the public and legal audiences as well as legislative advocacy to improve Wisconsin elections. The Impact Specialist will be responsible for executing policy initiatives, maintaining and expanding relationships with key stakeholders, and serving as an expert representative of the organization to diverse audiences. We strongly encourage candidates from diverse backgrounds and from across the political and ideological spectrum to apply.

raw_description: Marcus & Millichap is the nation’s leading brokerage firm specializing in real estate investments with offices nationwide. Marcus & Millichap offers owners and investors the nation's most comprehensive real estate research and analysis for all types of income-producing property. This role will be central to process optimization, business process mapping, requirements definition, and solution design across multiple financial functions within our commercial real estate operations spanning about 80 offices across the U.S. and Canada. The ideal candidate brings deep hands-on experience with Oracle Cloud ERP (Financials, Procurement), Oracle Cloud EPM (Planning, Consolidation), and has a strong background in evaluating, optimizing, and documenting business processes in a complex multi-entity environment. You are a self-starter who excels at identifying architectural bottlenecks and transforming them into seamless, automated "paved roads" that increase team velocity without sacrificing stability. Our mission is simple: to make really high quality essentials for really low prices, produced fairly and sustainably. Always a Better Deal: Innovation and transparency ensure value for both customers and partners.

title: Technical Due Diligence Consultant
raw_description: We recognize that teams with diverse backgrounds and different experiences are powerful. Contractors will provide country-specific expertise related to carbon projects, which could include land-use change, reforestation, improved forest management, biomass sourcing, political, regulatory, and economic s, social and cultural dynamics, and supply chains. This is a project-based, contract position. Together, we are creating an environment where everyone is celebrated and anyone can succeed. Carbon Direct is a science-first organization that combines technology with deep expertise in climate science, data, and policy to deliver actionable climate strategies, and high-quality carbon dioxide removal to decarbonize the global economy.

raw_description: About the Role As a Mid-Market Account Executive, you will be responsible for driving new business opportunities within mid-market prospects. You will position Teramind as the supplier of choice within your accounts. To meet and exceed your individual sales quota, you will drive the sales cycle to success. You will meet the client’s requirements and be responsible for collaborating with the relevant internal teams to deliver successful sales proposals. The right candidate will possess excellent energy and a real desire to build business across a portfolio of accounts. They will have the ability to build effective relationships quickly and to find valuable business within each account immediately that can then be enhanced by leveraging internal resources. raw_description: We are hiring for a Strategic Alliances Director to join our team, reporting to the Regional Director, Strategic Alliances. In this role, you will take ownership of a defined portfolio of consulting and brokerage firms building and strengthening senior-level relationships. Your mission is to ensure Spring Health is known, trusted, and actively championed at the firm level as the preferred mental health solution. Operating nationally and globally, you will shape consultant perspective, influence enterprise strategy, and drive consistent advocacy across regions, practices, and specialty groups. By deepening executive alignment and firm-wide engagement, you will create early demand, generate a net-new pipeline, and strengthen our competitive position before opportunities formally enter the market. Through these partnerships, you will play a critical role in expanding Spring Health’s inclusion, accelerating growth, and reinforcing our position as the mental health partner of choice across the consulting channel. raw_description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. title: IT Support Technician (6-Month Fixed-Term: July 2026 – Jan 2027)
raw_description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. Dataiku is seeking a temporary, full-time IT Support Technician to join the Information Technology Team from July 2026 to January 2027. The endpoint hardware split is 90/10 Mac/Windows, and the candidate should ideally have experience with both.

title: 3PL Fulfillment Operations Manager - Atlanta, GA
raw_description: We are seeking a 3PL Fulfillment Operations Manager in Atlanta, GA to join our growing team. This role will own -end warehouse and fulfillment performance across our third-party logistics (3PL) network, ensuring operational excellence from inbound receiving through outbound delivery. In this role, you will drive improvements in speed, accuracy, and cost efficiency while building scalable processes and strong partnerships across carriers, vendors, and internal teams. Our mission is simple: to make really high quality essentials for really low prices, produced fairly and sustainably. Always a Better Deal: Innovation and transparency ensure value for both customers and partners. Quince partners with world-class manufacturers across the globe and serves millions of customers. title: Senior Sales Engineer
raw_description: About the RoleAs a Senior Sales Engineer at Teramind, you serve as both a hands-on technical consultant and a player-coach for our growing Solution Engineering team. This hybrid role blends solution architecture, technical sales, and cross-functional leadership — perfect for someone who wants to shape both customer outcomes and team excellence. You'll work closely with Sales, Product, Engineering, and Customer Success to ensure enterprise customers realize the full value of Teramind's platform, while also mentoring team members, scaling pre-sales processes, and driving technical consistency across the organization. This is the ideal role for a technically fluent communicator who thrives in customer-facing engagements and has a passion for coaching others. Key Responsibilities Pre-Sales & Technical Engagement Deliver tailored product demonstrations and presentations aligned to customer use cases: insider threat detection, DLP, user behavior analytics (UBA), and workforce intelligence. Lead technical discovery sessions to understand prospect environments, pain points, security stack, and compliance requirements (HIPAA, PCI DSS, SOX, GDPR). Own and execute proof-of-value (POV) and proof-of-concept (POC) engagements — including environment setup, endpoint agent configuration, and success criteria alignment. Assist prospects with deployment planning across on-premise, cloud (SaaS), and private cloud architectures. Configure APIs and troubleshoot complex deployment and integration This is the ideal role for a technically fluent communicator who thrives in customer-facing engagements and has a passion for coaching others. title: Site Civil Engineer, Energy Services
raw_description: Woolpert is an award-winning, global leader in architecture, engineering, and geospatial services. Our team is passionate about their work and committed to building the generation of industry leaders, and as a certified Great Place to Work ®, Woolpert embraces progress and innovation to create limitless opportunities for career growth. Woolpert is hiring a Site Civil Engineer to join our dynamic Energy Services Team. This position is responsible for supporting civil site projects, typically including grading and earthwork, site access, erosion control, stormwater management, and other documentation to support the client's permitting and construction efforts. Priority will be given to candidates who are interested in civil site projects.

title: Site Civil Engineering Project Manager
raw_description: Woolpert is an award-winning, global leader in architecture, engineering, and geospatial services. Our team is passionate about their work and committed to building the generation of industry leaders, and as a certified Great Place to Work ®, Woolpert embraces progress and innovation to create limitless opportunities for career growth. Woolpert is hiring a Project Manager to join our dynamic Energy Team at our Columbus, OH office. title: Consultant (Advisory Geospatial)
location: Adelaide, Australia; Brisbane, Australia; Melbourne, Australia; Napier, New Zealand; Perth, Australia; Remote - New Zealand; Sydney, Australia
raw_description: We are looking for a Consultant (Advisory Geospatial) to join our high performing Strategic Advisory team. Reporting to the Vice President Director of Advisory Innovation, Woolpert Asia Pacific Middle East, you will be delivering strategic geospatial advisory and consulting services to clients across government, infrastructure, utilities, environment, and private sector markets. This role can be based in any of our offices across Australia - Melbourne, Sydney, Adelaide, Perth, or Brisbane; or New Zealand. Woolpert is an award-winning, global leader in architecture, engineering, and geospatial services. Our team is passionate about their work and committed to building the generation of industry leaders, and as a certified Great Place to Work ®, Woolpert embraces progress and innovation to create limitless opportunities for career growth. Woolpert is a global leader in Architecture, Engineering, and Geospatial (AEG), with a deep rooted and growing presence across Australia, building on our rich heritage as AAM.
